news.t: Tariffs, Trump and China: What 2025 holds for shipping stocks

holdings.infoBox: FEUS is an equity ETF with a total of 177 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.88%, Apple at 6.99%, Microsoft at 4.66%, Amazon.com at 3.83%, and Alphabet at 3.47%.

overview.description: The FlexShares ESG & Climate US Large Cap Core Index Fund (FEUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a principles-based index of US-listed large-cap companies that exhibit environmental, social, and corporate governance (ESG) characteristics. FEUS was launched on Sep 20, 2021 and is issued by FlexShares.
infoTable: Northern Trust ESG & Climate US Large Cap Core Index

data.title: Tariffs, Trump and China: What 2025 holds for shipping stocks
data.text: The shipping industry enters 2025 with tariffs on the horizon as President-elect Donald Trump prepares to take office.
